name: Broccoli and Lemon Dish
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam broccoli over water in a large pot for several minutes until tender.
2. In a separate pot over medium heat, constantly stir lemon juice, water, and cornstarch until the sauce thickens, about 2 minutes.
3. Serve the sauce over steamed broccoli.
Passover Seder Ideas from "The Lowfat Jewish Vegetarian Cookbook--Healthy Traditions from Around the World" by Debra Wasserman.
